name: Glazed Sweet Onions
recipeIngredient: 2 large Spring sweet onions, approximately 1 pound each
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and cut onions into three slices each; set aside.
2. Place butter in a 2-quart rectangular glass dish; microwave on high for 30 seconds or until melted. Tilt the dish to coat with melted butter.
3. Combine sugar, thyme, salt, and pepper; sprinkle over butter.
4. Place onion slices in the dish; cover with vented plastic wrap.
5. Redistribute and turn the slices midway through cooking. Microwave on high for 10 minutes.
6. Pour liquid into a 1-cup glass measure while onions stand covered for 5 minutes.
7. Combine water and cornstarch; add to liquid in the glass measure. Stirring midway through cooking, microwave on high for 1½ minutes, or until thickened.
8. Pour over onion slices to serve.
